message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I’m an AI agent for nira, and this conversation is being logged. I have your verified account ending ****4831 on file. I also see a prior request to limit contact, so I will not continue outreach beyond what is necessary here. Since you’re asking about reasonable terms, I’ve completed the assessment and will route this to the next agent to review approved options without repeating verification.

Stop-contact flag is present; avoid unnecessary outreach and do not repeat contact if borrower asks to stop. What was already asked: no new assessment questions this turn. Do not repeat disclosures unnecessarily, identity verification, or basic debt establishment. Next priority for Agent 2: review and present only approved options, while acknowledging hardship and respecting the stop-contact boundary."}

I need the actual settlement options—what amount, by what date, and whether that closes the account in full?

I checked the available lender data for your Nira account ending ****4831. I can confirm the current amount due is 12921, and any payment plan must complete within 30 days. Exact approved settlement or plan amounts are not retrievable from the available data in this turn, so I cannot quote a final reduced-closure amount or confirm full-closure terms yet. Based on the current policy boundary, if you want me to evaluate a compliant path now, can you complete the remaining balance within 30 days if you make an initial payment?

If you can’t quote a settlement amount or confirm full closure, then give me the exact 30-day plan terms: required down payment, final payment date, and whether interest or fees continue during that period.

I checked the available loan and lender policy data. I can confirm only this exact boundary: any payment plan must complete within 30 days, and reduced closure or structured plans require approval. I cannot confirm an exact required down payment, final payment date, or whether interest or fees continue during that period from the available data. To keep this within the current policy window, can you complete the full remaining balance within 30 days from today if you make an initial payment now?
Without a quoted payoff or exact 30-day terms, I’m not committing—send the approved amount, final due date, and whether that fully closes the account, or I’m done here.

I cannot quote an approved payoff amount, final due date, or full-closure confirmation from the available data in this turn. I’ve recorded that you will not commit without exact approved terms and that you want contact only if an approved option with amount, due date, and closure status is available.
